Item.get.description: Retrieve many items, optionally filtered by IDs, group, type or search text

Item.getExt.description: Retrieve many items including prices, stock quantities and image URLs

Item.getQuantity.description: Retrieve current stock quantities for items

Item.add.description: Create an item (product or service) in the catalog

Item.edit.description: Update an existing item in the catalog

Item.delete.description: Permanently delete an item from the catalog

Item.deleteMark.description: Mark an item for deletion without removing it

Item.import.description: Bulk import items into the catalog

Partner.get.description: Retrieve many partners (counterparties such as suppliers and customers)

Account.get.description: Retrieve many money accounts (cash desks and bank accounts)

AccountBalance.get.description: Retrieve current balances for money accounts

Barcode.add.description: Register a barcode for an item

Event.get.description: Replay persistent webhook events from the last 7 days using a last_event_id cursor

Webhook.get.description: Retrieve the list of webhook events this integration can subscribe to

IntegrationWebhook.get.description: Retrieve the webhook events currently registered for this integration

ConnectedIntegration.getWebhookInfo.description: Retrieve webhook delivery health and reputation for this integration

CurrentTimeStamp.get.description: Retrieve the current REGOS server time as a Unix timestamp

ItemPrice.get.description: Retrieve current prices per item and price type

Currency.get.description: Retrieve many currencies with their exchange rates
